raw_text:
NexFlow Systems

Intern Backend Engineer

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA

TYPE

Full-Time Internship

COMPENSATION

$22-26/hour

TECH STACK

Python

Go

PostgreSQL

Redis

RabbitMQ

Docker

Git

REST APIs

gRPC

Linux

About NexFlow Systems: NexFlow Systems is a rapidly growing
data infrastructure company focused on building robust, scalable
backend systems for enterprise clients. We specialize in
designing and implementing event-driven architectures that help
organizations process and act on data in real-time. Our mission is

to simplify complex distributed systems so that engineers can
focus on solving business problems rather than infrastructure
challenges.

Join NexFlow Systems as an Intern Backend Engineer and gain
hands-on experience building scalable distributed systems. You'll

work alongside our experienced engineering team to develop
microservices, optimize database queries, and learn best
practices in backend architecture. This is an excellent opportunity
to apply your computer science fundamentals in a real-world
environment and contribute to systems handling millions of
events daily.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Develop and test RESTful APIs using Python and Go, following
established coding standards and design patterns

Assist in designing and implementing microservices that
interact with PostgreSQL and Redis databases

Write unit tests and integration tests to ensure code quality and
reliability across the backend stack

Participate in code reviews and collaborate with senior
engineers to understand design decisions and architectural
tradeoffs

Debug and troubleshoot issues in staging and production
environments under guidance from mentors

Document API endpoints, database schemas, and deployment
procedures to support team knowledge sharing

Implement message queue consumers using RabbitMQ to
process asynchronous tasks and events

Contribute to performance optimization efforts by profiling
applications and identifying bottlenecks

REQUIREMENTS

Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science,
Software Engineering, or related field (or recent graduate

Empowering real-time data pipelinesfor the modern enterprise within 6 months)

Strong foundation in at least one programming language
(Python, Java, Go, or Rust)

Understanding of relational databases and basic SQL query
optimization

Familiarity with REST API design principles and HTTP
protocols

Basic knowledge of version control systems (Git) and

collaborative development workflows

BONUS POINTS

Previous internship experience in backend or infrastructure
engineering

Exposure to containerization technologies like Docker or
Kubernetes

Experience with asynchronous programming patterns and
message queues

Understanding of microservices architecture and distributed
systems concepts

BENEFITS

Competitive hourly internship pay with potential for conversion
to full-time role

Flexible working hours to accommodate academic schedules

Professional development budget for online courses,
certifications, or conference attendance

Mentorship program pairing you with senior engineers for
guidance and career development

Health insurance options for full-time internship participants

Free snacks, beverages, and casual office environment

Opportunity to work on real products used by enterprise
customers

Remote-friendly setup with option to work from home 2 days
per week

APPLY

Submit your resume, a brief cover letter explaining your interest in
backend engineering, and a link to your GitHub profile (or
portfolio) to careers@nexflow-systems.com. Applications
reviewed on a rolling basis. Technical interview will include a
take-home coding assignment and discussion of a real-world

 backend challenge. Please include your expected graduation
date and availability in your cover letter.
